name: Marcus Chen
investment_thesis_or_beat: Crypto infrastructure, stablecoin payments, DeFi protocols. a16z has invested $7.6B in crypto since 2013. Focus on regulatory-compliant infrastructure plays.

name: Rachel Goldstein
investment_thesis_or_beat: Consumer finance, embedded finance, neobanks. Ribbit led investments in Robinhood, Coinbase, Revolut. Focus on unit economics and regulatory moat.
known_positions: Regulatory moat is a feature not a bug
Consumer fintech is overcrowded, B2B is the opportunity

name: James Hartley
investment_thesis_or_beat: Crypto infrastructure, zero-knowledge proofs, stablecoin rails. Paradigm manages $10B+ focused exclusively on crypto/Web3 with deep technical due diligence.

name: Sarah Mitchell
investment_thesis_or_beat: Head of compliance at a mid-size fintech. Evaluates tools for KYC/AML automation. Stripe Treasury handles $1T+ in payments, requires strict compliance.
known_positions: False positive rates matter more than coverage

name: David Park
investment_thesis_or_beat: VP Engineering at a neobank. Evaluates infrastructure tools for speed and reliability. Mercury serves 200K+ startups with banking APIs.
known_positions: Prefer proven tech over bleeding edge

name: Nina Sharma
investment_thesis_or_beat: Product lead at Asia's largest payment gateway. Evaluates compliance tools for cross-border payments. Razorpay processes $80B+ annually.
known_positions: Cross-border compliance is the hardest problem
Pricing must work for high-volume low-margin

name: Oliver Brooks
investment_thesis_or_beat: 15-year veteran of consumer financial protection. Now consulting. Deeply skeptical of AI replacing human judgment in compliance decisions.
known_positions: AI cannot replace human judgment in compliance
Regulators will crack down on AI compliance tools

name: Helen Frost
investment_thesis_or_beat: Managing Director at Deloitte Risk Advisory. 20 years in financial services risk management. Questions whether startups can handle enterprise compliance.

name: Alex Rivera
investment_thesis_or_beat: Senior reporter covering fintech, neobanks, and crypto regulation. TechCrunch fintech vertical reaches 10M+ monthly readers. Asks hard questions about differentiation.
known_positions: How is this different from existing solutions
What happens when Stripe adds this feature

name: Wei Zhang
investment_thesis_or_beat: Reporter covering stablecoin regulation and CBDC developments. The Block is the leading crypto-native news outlet. Deep regulatory knowledge.

name: Thomas Weber
investment_thesis_or_beat: Circle issues USDC ($25B+ market cap), the second-largest stablecoin. Direct competitor in compliant stablecoin infrastructure. Has MiCA license in EU.
known_positions: New entrants face 2-3 year licensing timeline
Our compliance infrastructure took $100M+ to build

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
investment_thesis_or_beat: Chainalysis provides blockchain analytics to 1200+ customers including government agencies. Dominant in crypto compliance with $8.6B valuation.
known_positions: We own the compliance data layer
Transaction monitoring requires years of training data

name: Director Patricia Collins
investment_thesis_or_beat: FinCEN administers the Bank Secrecy Act and enforces AML regulations. Issues guidance on money services businesses, virtual currency, and suspicious activity reporting.
known_positions: MSB registration is mandatory per 31 CFR 1022
Virtual currency businesses are money transmitters
Failure to register carries criminal penalties

name: Commissioner Robert Tanaka
real_company_reference: California DFPI - Dept of Financial Protection and Innovation
investment_thesis_or_beat: CA DFPI oversees money transmitter licensing in the largest US market. Issues Digital Financial Assets Law licenses. California has the strictest state-level crypto regulation.
known_positions: State licensing is separate from federal

name: Elena Volkov
investment_thesis_or_beat: Head of international compliance at Eastern Europe's largest neobank. Evaluates cross-border compliance tools for emerging market expansion.
known_positions: Cost per verification must be under $0.50

name: Carlos Mendoza

name: Amara Okafor
investment_thesis_or_beat: Head of compliance at Africa's leading payments company. Flutterwave processes $16B+ across 34 African countries. Needs multi-country compliance tooling.

name: Kenji Taniguchi

AI explainability is mandatory for regulated use
